title: Sweet Gooey Jamaican Ackee Stir-fry
description: A festive sweet and gooey Jamaican dish featuring ackee with a touch of smoke flavor, perfect for low-carb diets.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh or frozen ackee
ingredients.notes: ensure ackee is clean and safe to eat

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add diced onions and minced garlic, sauté until translucent.
Fold in ackee slices, adding salt and smoked paprika to taste. Cook for about 5 minutes.
Stir in unsweetened shredded coconut, reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer for about 10-12 minutes or until the ackee becomes soft and coated with a sweet glaze.
Add granulated sugar, stirring continuously until it melts into the sauce, creating a gooey texture. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot as a snack accompaniment to meals.
